metadata.description: xos — Exponential OS for Exponential Orgs, Humans, and More 2.0 (a play on the Singularity University book by Salim Ismail). The platform marketplace catalog hosted by Exponential-OS. Hosts the xOS family — AI-native operating systems for humans (xHumanOS), teams (xTeamOS), communities (xCommunityOS), families (xFamilyOS), and beyond — plus standalone tools (Co-Dialectic) and apps (Career-OS). Plugins install as @xos.

plugins.name: co-dialectic
plugins.description: Co-Dialectic v4.1.0 — LLM prompt optimizer + auto-verify by stakes (T0-T4) + auto-handoff on closure + honesty selector (brutal/grounded/soft) + agent-swarm default-on + hygiene cycle + cross-family cascade-then-jury review (judge-panel) + hallucination detector + research-first mode + fish-swarm orchestration + session handoff codification. Socratic coaching, persona detection, context management, prompt improvement, and Defense-in-Depth verification across any AI.

plugins.name: career-os
plugins.description: Career OS — AI-powered career management system. The operating system for your career — persistent memory, session capture, git-versioned data, full privacy. v0.25.1 file-only substrate + biographical-claim precheck.
